title: Admin access gate with role verification
description: Protect admin routes and verify role/permissions using backend session verification endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-admin users are blocked from admin routes
Unauthorized access returns structured error with requestId

title: Admin dashboard shell and permission-aware menu
description: Use admin_menu_permissions.json to render only allowed modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu items hidden when permission missing
Session check performed on app launch

title: Backend audit log writer utility
description: Write immutable auditLogs entry on every admin mutation.

title: Users list with search/filter/sort/pagination
description: Build admin users list with account status chips and profile drawer.

title: Suspend/reactivate with reason modal
description: Implement user moderation actions with mandatory reason for suspension.

title: Trainer application queue details
description: Build list/detail view and approve/reject flow with reviewer notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Approve promotes user role to trainer

title: Global booking monitor filters
description: Provide date/status/trainer filters and admin booking actions.

title: Support and dispute workflow
description: Implement support ticket board and dispute assignment/resolution states.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log on every status transition

title: Finance approvals and payout workflow
description: Revenue cards, ledger, refunds, and payouts with dual-approval threshold.

title: Analytics and async export center
description: Build analytics charts and PDF/Excel export jobs with downloadable links.
acceptanceCriteria: Download links are signed and time-bound
